headline: Rohingya Policy Shift Tightens Rules on 185,000 Refugees
context: Malaysia implemented stricter enforcement against 185,000 Rohingya refugees in 2025 with raids and detentions increasing sharply.

cards.big: Crackdown on 185,000 Rohingya intensifies with 4,200 detained in 2025
cards.sub: Policy reflects growing public hostility toward refugees amid economic pressure

cards.big: Immigration raids detained 4,200 Rohingya triple the 1,400 in 2023
cards.sub: Detention centres hold 3,800 at 180% capacity in overcrowded conditions

cards.big: UNHCR reported 28 Rohingya deaths in immigration detention in 2025
cards.sub: Agency called for investigation and access to detention facilities

cards.big: Polls show 72% of Malaysians oppose accepting more Rohingya refugees
cards.sub: Social media campaigns depicting Rohingya as threat intensified since 2023

cards.big: Refugee policy tests whether humanitarian obligations survive public opinion pressure
185,000 Rohingya refugees under tighter rules. Humanitarian obligation and border control must coexist, not compete.
